mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, task_id, author_id, body, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comments WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (tenant_id, task_id, author_id, body, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{c.taskId}, #{c.authorId}, #{c.body}, #{c.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comments WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
